# Faricimab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Faricimab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Faricimab</strong> 目前有 <strong>11 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Faricimab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Vabysmo is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with:  neovascular (wet) age-related macular degeneration (nAMD), visual impairment due to diabetic macular oedema (DME), visual impairment...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（98.9%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（98.7%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（98.4%）</li>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（97.8%）</li>
<li>esotropia（97.7%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（97.2%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（96.9%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（96.8%）</li>
<li>respiratory syncytial virus infectious disease（96.4%）</li>
<li>fetal and neonatal alloimmune thrombocytopenia（96.1%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（95.7%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（95.7%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（95.7%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（95.6%）</li>
<li>progressive multiple sclerosis（95.5%）</li>
<li>diabetic cataract（95.0%）</li>
<li>non-syndromic esophageal malformation（94.6%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（93.9%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（93.8%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（93.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/faricimab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
